recommendations.title: The Paper Chase
recommendations.overview: A first-year law student struggles with balancing his coursework and his relationship with the daughter of a stern professor.

recommendations.title: Bright Lights, Big City
recommendations.overview: A disillusioned young writer living in New York City turns to drugs and drinking to block out the memories of his dead mother and estranged wife.

recommendations.title: The China Syndrome
recommendations.overview: While doing a series of reports on alternative energy sources, opportunistic reporter Kimberly Wells witnesses an accident at a nuclear power plant. Wells is determined to publicize the incident, but soon finds herself entangled in a sinister conspir

recommendations.title: Urban Cowboy
recommendations.overview: After moving to Pasadena, Texas, country boy Bud Davis starts hanging around a bar called Gilley's, where he falls in love with Sissy, a cowgirl who believes the sexes are equal. They eventually marry, but their relationship is turbulent due to Bud's

recommendations.title: Fight Club
recommendations.overview: A ticking-time-bomb insomniac and a slippery soap salesman channel primal male aggression into a shocking new form of therapy. Their concept catches on, with underground "fight clubs" forming in every town, until an eccentric gets in the way and igni

recommendations.title: Racer and the Jailbird
recommendations.overview: When Gino meets racing driver Bénédicte, it's love at first sight. But Gino has a secret. The kind of secret that can endanger their lives.

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.

recommendations.title: Victor/Victoria
recommendations.overview: A struggling female soprano finds work playing a male female impersonator, but it complicates her personal life.

recommendations.title: 3 Generations
recommendations.overview: A teenager transitions from female to male, and his family must come to terms with that fact.

recommendations.title: Don't Be Bad
recommendations.overview: A story set in the 90s and in the outskirts of Rome to Ostia. A world where money, luxury cars, night clubs, cocaine and synthetic drugs are easy to run. A world in which Vittorio and Cesare, in their early twenties, act in search of their success.
